{{Infobox group
| name = Redmoon Hall
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Redmoon Hall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is an ancient organization of [[sacred artists]] that serves the [[Dreadgod]] known as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. The group is divided into two primary factions: one that views the [[Phoenix]] as a divine entity to be worshipped, and another that seeks to exploit the creature for power. The organization operates from a mobile headquarters consisting of a massive, dark-wood cloudship equipped with blood tanks and specialized control rooms. Members typically wear black and red attire, often featuring a red moon symbol, and are characterized by their use of [[Blood Shadows]]. These shadows can be controlled by vassals or utilized by powerful emissaries to enhance their combat capabilities, sometimes allowing them to fight beyond their natural stage or even manifesting as weapons and monstrous beasts. The hierarchy includes various ranks such as [[Jade]], [[Herald]], [[Truegold]], and [[Underlord]], with high-ranking leaders including the [[Sage of Red Faith]] and the [[Redmoon Herald]]. While some members act as scavengers feeding off the destruction caused by their master, others are highly disciplined and powerful, with emissaries capable of reaching the [[Underlord]] level. Despite their strength, the group has faced internal division and instability following the disappearance of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is an organization of servants, including ranks such as [[Jade]] and [[Herald]], who attend to the feeding of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] by sensing its needs through embedded parasites. This group utilizes emissaries and can appear within a week if the [[Phoenix]] is alerted, having already closed Arelius branches in the south. Currently washing over the southern [[Empire]] like a tide, the entity has nested near the border and attracted the attention of the [[Jai Underlord]]. Although [[Yerin]] serves as an emissary for the group, she has no desire to work for them, and the [[Skysworn]] find themselves in direct opposition to this destructible threat. While [[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is not pursuing [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] specifically, the duo remains wary of engaging in battle against them.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group of servants that attend to the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]'s feeding.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Members of [[Redmoon Hall]] sense the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]'s needs through parasites embedded in their bodies.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The ranks of [[Redmoon Hall]] include [[Jade]] and [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] may show themselves within a week if the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] is alerted.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is an organization with emissaries.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are discussing.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group or entity being opposed.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is not after [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is washing over the southern [[Empire]] like a tide.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that has nested near the border.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is an entity that can be destroyed.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that the [[Skysworn]] are going [[sword]]-to-[[sword]] with.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is an organization [[Yerin]] does not wish to work for.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a threat to the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that attracted the attention of the [[Jai Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is an entity [[Lindon]] is not eager to rush into battle against.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is an emissary of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] has closed Arelius branches in the south.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Emissaries]] from [[Redmoon Hall]] have already performed an action [[Lindon]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group currently in the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is an organization composed largely of scavengers that maintains territory on the edge of the [[Ghostwater]] portal. The group's emissaries are identifiable by their black-and-red robes, and they have shown interest in the [[Trackless Sea]] after retrieving an item from within [[Ghostwater]]. While [[Eithan]] identifies them as a threat that he intends to mop up, the group is also known for capturing members to compel them into service for the [[Empire]]. During their travels, [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] are perceived as members of this group, and [[Yerin]] herself possesses the power of [[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] within her.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] possesses the power of [[Redmoon Hall]] inside her.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that has members who can be captured and compelled to work for the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Redmoon Hall girl]] is present in the clearing.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a threat [[Eithan]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group whose emissaries wear black-and-red robes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is an organization [[Eithan]] intends to mop up.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] has territory on the edge of the [[Ghostwater]] portal.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group largely made up of scavengers.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The characters are approaching [[Redmoon Hall]] territory.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] are seen as members of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] is interested in the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Redmoon Hall]] retrieved something in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Redmoon Hall]] possesses [[Blood Shadows]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group on the red floor of the [[Dreadgod]] tower.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a location or faction associated with [[Blacksword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is a sect that maintains a presence as one of the groups surrounding the valley. The faction is represented by member [[Yan Shoumei]] and includes individuals such as [[Blacksword]]. Their assets include a red-tinged cloudship adorned with the symbol of a [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. Led by an [[Overlady]], the sect utilizes specialized abilities including a crimson bird technique and a method to break down a [[Blood Shadow]] for power.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a sect.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blacksword]] is from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a faction represented by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a member of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] possesses a red-tinged cloudship painted with a [[Bleeding Phoenix]] symbol.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A member of [[Redmoon Hall]] launched a crimson bird technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] has an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] has a technique to break down a [[Blood Shadow]] for power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Hall]] is one of the groups surrounding the valley.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Malice]] hates [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is an organization that utilizes a massive ship as its mobile headquarters. This great vessel can be seen floating beside the northern peak, where it houses an audience hall for its members. The group includes [[Emissary Kahn Mala]], who serves among the [[Emissaries]] of [[Redmoon]] [[Hall]]. These individuals are tasked with guarding the stone door.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group with a mobile headquarters consisting of a massive ship.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Redmoon Hall]] has an audience hall.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Redmoon Hall]] possesses a great ship that floats beside the northern peak.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group or organization that [[Emissary Kahn Mala]] belongs to.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Emissaries]] of [[Redmoon Hall]] guard the stone door.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Operating from a cloud fortress that leaks cloud madra, [[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is a group led by both a [[Herald]] and a [[Sage]]. The organization consists of the leader [[Redmoon]] and [[Emissaries]], who are members that have bonded a [[Blood Shadow]]. Although they utilize script formations and [[construct]] networks, the group is not a unified force; instead, it is divided into two halves with conflicting goals regarding the [[Phoenix]]. While members typically avoid conflict between their two leaders, the [[Phoenix]] eventually manifests a small portion of itself onto the group. During a confrontation where [[Reigan Shen]]'s weapons prepared to destroy them, the members of [[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] were seen shrinking back in fear.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] was not present at the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is led by a [[Herald]] and a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that includes the leader [[Redmoon]] and [[Emissaries]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is not a unified force.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] members who have bonded a [[Blood Shadow]] are called [[Emissaries]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group with members present at the scene.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] members avoid conflict between their two leaders.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] has script formations and [[construct]] networks.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is divided into two halves with conflicting goals regarding the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that [[Yerin]] wants to see tear itself apart.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Phoenix]] manifests a small portion of itself onto [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall]] operates from a cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Redmoon Hall's cloud fortress]] is leaking cloud madra.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]]'s weapons were preparing to destroy [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The members of [[Redmoon Hall]] are shrinking back in fear.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Redmoon Hall]] has a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kahn Mala]] belongs to [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Redmoon Hall]] is attached to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Redmoon Hall]] remains in the area.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Redmoon]] [[Hall]] is a group to which [[Yan Shoumei]] belongs. Described as being even more depraved than typical slaughter artists, the organization operates under the protection of the [[Void Sage]]. Both [[Yan Shoumei]] and [[Kahn Mala]] are identified as members of this group.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has connections in [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Redmoon Hall]] is described as being worse than run-of-the-mill slaughter artists.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Redmoon Hall]] is a group that [[Yan Shoumei]] belongs to.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Redmoon Hall]] is under the protection of the [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kahn Mala]] is from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An Overlady from Redmoon Hall called out, “A bit of sport to liven things up. Would you like to play?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“No Redmoon Hall either, which is half a treat.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Yan Shoumei of Redmoon Hall,” the man said, “why have you called my name?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
